articles.title: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
articles.description: The US vice-president wrote the "only response is righteous anger" when referring to Henry Nowak's death on X.

articles.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
articles.description: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

articles.title: Tributes to Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head who dies aged 72
articles.description: The British actor, who also appeared in Merlin and Little Britain, died of complications from pneumonia.

articles.title: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
articles.description: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.
